title: An Identity for Vertically Aligned Entries in Pascal's Triangle
abstract: The classic way to write down Pascal's triangle leads to entries in alternating rows being vertically aligned. In this paper, we prove a linear dependence on vertically aligned entries in Pascal's triangle. Furthermore, we give an application of this dependence to morphisms between hyperelliptic curves.
comment: 8 pages. Revised Remark 1, results unchanged. Comments are welcome
